scripts.build:cli: npm run build -w @johnkjobloop/oppgavehjelper && bun build packages/cli/dist/index.js --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/oppgavehjelper && bun build packages/cli/dist/index.js --compile --target=bun-win-x64 --outfile dist/oppgavehjelper-winx64 && bun build packages/cli/dist/index.js --compile --target=bun-macos-arm64 --outfile dist/oppgavehjelper-macarm64 && bun build packages/cli/dist/index.js --compile --target=bun-macos-x64 --outfile dist/oppgavehjelper-macx64 && bun build packages/cli/dist/index.js --compile --target=bun-win-arm64 --outfile dist/oppgavehjelper-winarm64
scripts.verify: npm run bdd && npm run test
